scripts.clean:ports: for port in 3001 3002 4001 4002 50051; do lsof -ti :$port | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; echo 'Ports cleaned'
scripts.dev: bun run clean:ports && turbo run dev
scripts.dev:web: bun run clean:ports && turbo run dev --filter=@autix/chat-web --filter=@autix/user --filter=@autix/chat --filter=@autix/user-system
scripts.dev:desktop: bun run clean:ports && turbo run dev --filter=@autix/desktop --filter=@autix/chat --filter=@autix/user-system
